parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor mobile
participant www
boundary endpoint
boundary haproxy
entity ipfs
entity postgraphile
entity "CITY Custom Net" as city
boundary logstash
control dApp
database postgres
database elastic
participant prometheus
participant kibana

group webUI
    mobile -> www : sign & send events
    note right of mobile : browser ext or mobile wallet
    www -> endpoint : HTTPS gateway & peer tcp/4001
    endpoint -> ipfs : /ipfs/{CID}
    activate ipfs
    endpoint -> haproxy : HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
    note right of www : User makes deposit / signs entry to trigger events.
end

group api - Admin/Write api
    haproxy -> city : /v2 - read/write factom api
    activate city
    haproxy -> ipfs : /ipfs/{CID} - readonly gateway
    haproxy -> postgraphile : /graphql - readonly graphql queries
    activate postgraphile
    city -> logstash : livefeed log
    activate logstash
    logstash -> elastic : index event logs
    activate elastic
    logstash -> postgres : dApp specific events
    activate postgres
    dApp -> postgres : sign and dispatch requests
    activate dApp
    dApp -> city : read/write signed factom entries
end

group dashboard
    elastic -> kibana : dashboard query
    activate kibana
    prometheus -> prometheus : poll()
    activate prometheus
    prometheus -> city : Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXXX) Balance changes
    prometheus -> logstash : HTTP GET /metrics
    prometheus -> ipfs : HTTP GET /metrics
    kibana -> prometheus : metrics query
    postgres -> kibana : dApp specific rollup
end

group dApp - controller
    postgres -> dApp : dispatch on-chain event
    dApp -> logstash : dApp specific logging
    dApp -> ipfs : pin entry content on IPFS
end

@enduml
```
